title: macrotyloma tenuiflorum
intro: Macrotyloma tenuiflorum, also known as horse gram, is a type of legume native to tropical Asia, characterized by its small, yellow flowers and brown or black seeds. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antidiabetic properties. The health benefits of horse gram include lowering cholesterol levels, reducing blood sugar levels, and aiding in weight management, making it a popular ingredient in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine. Horse gram can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including powder, seeds, and oil, which can be consumed as a supplement or used in cooking.
